author: Paul Yu
message: chore: update container images to version 2.2.0 across all services

author: Paul Yu
message: docs: add Copilot instructions for aks-store-demo

author: Paul Yu
message: refactor: implement background order queue consumer and update order fetching logic

author: Paul Yu
message:
refactor: update RabbitMQ to version 4.3.2 and remove unnecessary plugins configuration
since as of RabbitMQ 4.x.x AMQP 1.0 is natively supported

author: Paul Yu
message: refactor: replace MongoDB with DocumentDB across the application

author: Paul Yu
message:
refactor: product service routes and handlers

- Update dependencies
- Consolidated product-related routes into a single `products.rs` file for better organization.
- Removed outdated `delete.rs`, `get.rs`, and `update.rs` files.
- Updated AI service routes to improve error handling and response formatting.
- Enhanced health check endpoint to utilize application state for versioning.
- Streamlined payload handling in AI description and image generation functions.
- Removed redundant test files and replaced them with a more structured integration test suite.
- Updated Docker Compose file for consistent formatting and improved readability.

author: Paul Yu
message:
refactor: azure openai integration for image generation

- Updated predeploy script to use new environment variables for image model.
- Modified Helm chart templates to accommodate new image model configurations.
- Adjusted values.yaml to replace DALL-E references with image model settings.
- Enhanced docker-compose.yml for health checks and environment variables related to image generation.
- Revised documentation to reflect changes in environment variables and deployment options.
- Updated Bicep and Terraform configurations to deploy the new image generation model.
- Refactored AI service code to handle image generation requests and responses.
- Improved error handling for image generation in the AI service.
- Enhanced product service to support larger payloads for image generation.
- Added user notifications in the frontend for AI operations.

author: dependabot[bot]
message:
build(deps-dev): bump vite, @vitejs/plugin-vue, @vitejs/plugin-vue-jsx and vite-plugin-vue-devtools

Bumps [vite](https://github.com/vitejs/vite/tree/HEAD/packages/vite), [@vitejs/plugin-vue](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-vue/tree/HEAD/packages/plugin-vue), [@vitejs/plugin-vue-jsx](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-vue/tree/HEAD/packages/plugin-vue-jsx) and [vite-plugin-vue-devtools](https://github.com/vuejs/devtools/tree/HEAD/packages/vite). These dependencies needed to be updated together.

Updates `vite` from 6.4.2 to 8.0.16
- [Release notes](https://github.com/vitejs/vite/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/vitejs/vite/blob/main/packages/vite/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/vitejs/vite/commits/v8.0.16/packages/vite)

Updates `@vitejs/plugin-vue` from 5.2.4 to 6.0.7
- [Release notes](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-vue/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-vue/blob/main/packages/plugin-vue/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-vue/commits/plugin-vue@6.0.7/packages/plugin-vue)

Updates `@vitejs/plugin-vue-jsx` from 4.2.0 to 5.1.5
- [Release notes](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-vue/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-vue/blob/main/packages/plugin-vue-jsx/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-vue/commits/plugin-vue@5.1.5/packages/plugin-vue-jsx)

Updates `vite-plugin-vue-devtools` from 7.7.9 to 8.1.3
- [Release notes](https://github.com/vuejs/devtools/releases)
- [Commits](https://github.com/vuejs/devtools/commits/v8.1.3/packages/vite)

---
updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: vite
  dependency-version: 8.0.16
  dependency-type: direct:development
- dependency-name: "@vitejs/plugin-vue"
  dependency-version: 6.0.7
  dependency-type: direct:development
- dependency-name: "@vitejs/plugin-vue-jsx"
  dependency-version: 5.1.5
  dependency-type: direct:development
- dependency-name: vite-plugin-vue-devtools
  dependency-version: 8.1.3
  dependency-type: direct:development
...
